titleStmt.title: SII 23.451: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 451. (A.R. No. 451 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Lakshmīnārāyaṇa temple—on the north, west and south walls Jaṭ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 13+6: 1208-09 A.D.

summary.p: The stones are out of order and some are lost. The inscription is also damaged. The introduction is the one commencing with the words Pūvīṉ kiḻatti. This registers a gift of land by the same Śīvallavaṉ Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ mentioned above who is said to have also got it exempted from kaḍamai payment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—pūviṉ kiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉi mātu nitiyiṟpuṇara va pormaṭantai ceyappuyattiruppa ma kkiṉil viḷaṅka ticai yirunāṉ ku micai nilāveṟippa maṟaineṟi vaḷara maṉuṉeṟi tikaḻa Aṟaneṟica� cattuva toḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭar varāṭar pal lavar kuṭai niḻaṟṟa ceṅkol naṭappa ṅkali naṭuṅka ṉeṭumpilat muṟaimuṟai paṇiya Iruṉemiyaḷavu moru yoṅka Iyallicai nāṭaka maṉṉavarāy
—ḷaṅkiya virasiṅhāsanattu kaṟpaka niḻalil kalaivallorkiḻ maṉṉavar teviyar vaṇaṅka meṉṉaṭai Avaṉi muḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟirunta ruḷiya māmutal matikkulamviḷakkiya komutaṟ koccaṭai tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekara 10 3- vatiṉ Etir kaṇṭaṉāṉa toṇṭaimāṉār dharmmadāṉam paṇṇik deyam Arikecarinallūr mahāsabhai davar śrīvallavaṉ tirunila tu Idadevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatiṉe tirāmāṇṭu patiṉeṭṭaṭikkolāl nilam Oru māvil I
—tu muntirikai nilaṅ kaṭamai tavittu niroṭaṭṭi tantu piṉpu patiṉ muṉṟāvatiṉ Etir Āṟāmāṇṭu tavintaruḷiṉa patiṉeṭṭaṭik kolāl nilamuntirikaiyum Āka nilam Araikkāṇi Araikkāṇi tavintaruḷiṉa Ikkaṭamai tavintaruḷiṉa ṇikkum kaṭamai tirumukappaṭi kallil veṭṭiṉeṉ Ivvūr cilpāca m puṉcaiyum Uṭpaṭa muṉpilā yum dānam paṇṇi Aruḷi koṇṭān colaiyaraicāṉa ti nāṭṭiyūr vāriyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.451 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
